## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and discuss GTM strategy for Obaid's new venture.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Obaid's New Venture:** Raised a $15M seed round for a conversational AI voice agent company. The product will automate dispatch services (e.g., roadside assistance) in the physical economy, starting with the trucking vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [**Immediate GTM Needs:** Requires a full GTM stack (CRM, outbound tools) and basic positioning/copy for a website, one-pager, and deck to launch quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Marcel's Recommendations:** Introduced Understory, a Clay-certified agency for GTM engineering, and Clarify, a CRM that will provide white-glove setup.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**growthx.ai Model:** A services-led software company ($13M ARR, cashflow positive) that uses its own "workflow as code" engine to deliver automated content outcomes for clients like Webflow and Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

## Topics

### Obaid's New Venture: Conversational AI Agents

  - [**Funding:** Raised a $15M seed round two weeks ago.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Team:** Hired a technical co-founder who built the first app at Motive (formerly Keep Truckin').](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Product:** Conversational AI voice agents to automate dispatch services in the physical economy.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Replaces human agents for order-taking and dispatch (e.g., roadside assistance, trucking, pest control).](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
      - [**Technology:** A horizontal platform with a verticalized GTM, starting with the trucking industry.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A strong GTM motion is critical for differentiation, as the core technology is becoming a commodity.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Obaid's Immediate GTM Needs

  - [**Outbound Tooling:** Requires a full stack for prospecting and outbound motion.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Positioning & Copy:** Needs basic assets for a website, one-pager, and deck to launch quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [**GTM Engineering:** Seeks a partner for AI-first outbound using tools like Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### growthx.ai: Services-Led Software Model

  - [**Business:** A services-led software company delivering automated content outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Metrics:** $13M ARR, cashflow positive, 70% gross margin.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [**Model:** Start with services to build credibility with clients (e.g., Webflow, Ramp), then productize the underlying tech.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Technology:** A proprietary "workflow as code" engine for building and running AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Framework:** Open-sourcing next month; positioned as superior to LangGraph and Crew.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Capabilities:** Automates research, drafting, fact-checking, and image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [**Pricing:** Starts at $15k/month; average client pays \~$200k/year.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Introduce Obaid to Understory (GTM agency) and Clarify (CRM) for setup.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [**Obaid:** Review Marcel's GTM content and schedule a coffee meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/3e1LzGagWJS59yhMfxTV5M7nN3dqY5cS?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
